title: Why Lumentum Stock Popped on Friday
text: On Friday morning, Craig-Hallum analyst Richard Shannon upgraded Lumentum stock to buy. Shannon forecasts a rebound in telecommunications equipment spending in 2024, spurred by AI and cloud computing needs.

title: Lumentum Holdings: Very Positive On The Cloud Light Technology Acquisition
text: I revised my rating for Lumentum Holdings from neutral to buy as I am positive about the potential of the Cloud Light Technology acquisition. The acquisition of CLT has significantly improved Lumentum's growth trajectory and competitive position. The high-speed transceiver market, particularly in the AI-related data center infrastructure, offers growth potential for Lumentum.

title: Is Lumentum a Top Stock to Buy in 2024?
text: Lumentum faces tough macro and competitive challenges. Acquisitions are helping reduce customer concentration issues, but its core businesses lack clear competitive advantages.

title: 2 Laser Systems Stocks to Watch in a Challenging Industry
text: The Zacks Laser Systems and Components industry participants like IPG Photonics (IPGP) and Lumentum (LITE) gain from solid demand for emerging applications like autonomous driving, IoT, 5G and healthcare amid challenging macroeconomic conditions.
